response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong distributed systems experience, deep Python/TypeScript proficiency, and clear ownership across high-scale environments — including AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq — aligning well with the role’s core demands. His open-source contributions and operational rigor further validate his systems thinking and agile readiness, though limited explicit AI/ML product exposure and minimal mention of on-call incident response are minor gaps.
strengths: Proven experience in AI-agent infrastructure and agentic code generation workflows at re:cinq
Deep expertise in high-throughput distributed systems from scaling microservices handling millions of requests/sec
Strong operational ownership demonstrated via DevOps tooling, CI/CD, and open-source project maintenance
concerns: Limited explicit mention of LLM/ML product experience or AI-native engineering environments beyond tooling
No clear evidence of formal on-call incident response or operational monitoring practices
German language skill is only basic, which may hinder stakeholder alignment in Berlin-based teams
